top.title: US and French nationals test positive for hantavirus after leaving ship
top.summary: The American national has arrived in Nebraska, while a French woman is isolating in Paris.

top.title: US passengers quarantining in Nebraska as officials say public hantavirus risk 'very low'
top.summary: Two people are being monitored in Atlanta, while 16 others are in Nebraska at the nation's only national quarantine unit.

top.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
top.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

top.title: TikTok launches £3.99 subscription for no ads in UK
top.summary: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.

top.title: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
top.summary: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.

top.title: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
top.summary: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
